metadata.name: ww-loader
metadata.description: A pure-CSS spinner / loading indicator based on SpinKit. Pick one of 12 animation styles and customize color and size. Purely visual ‚Äî no events, variables, actions, or interactions. Use conditional rendering (v-if based on a loading flag) to show/hide it.
features: 12 distinct animation styles covering minimalist, geometric, and rotating feels
Tiny (~2 KB CSS, no JS logic) ‚Äî safe to use in dense lists without perf concerns

properties.name: spinner
properties.description:
Which SpinKit animation to render. Visual descriptions:
- `plane` ‚Äî a single 2D square that flips/rotates in 3D (default, minimalist)
- `chase` ‚Äî 6 small dots chasing each other in a circle
- `bounce` ‚Äî 2 dots bouncing against each other (classic 'double-bounce')
- `wave` ‚Äî 5 vertical bars pulsing up/down like an audio equalizer
- `pulse` ‚Äî a single circle scaling in and out
- `flow` ‚Äî 3 dots moving horizontally in a wave pattern
- `swing` ‚Äî 2 dots orbiting each other like a pendulum
- `circle` ‚Äî 12 small dots around a ring, fading in sequence
- `circle-fade` ‚Äî same 12 dots, fading more gradually / softer feel
- `grid` ‚Äî 3√ó3 grid of cubes bouncing in a cascading pattern
- `fold` ‚Äî 4 cubes folding into a 2√ó2 grid
- `wander` ‚Äî 3 cubes moving randomly in a small area

properties.name: color
properties.description: Spinner color (CSS color value: hex, rgb, hsl, named ‚Äî e.g. `#3b82f6`, `rgb(59, 130, 246)`, `var(--ww-color-primary-500)`). Applied via the `--sk-color` CSS variable.

properties.name: size
properties.description: Spinner size as a CSS length in pixels (range 0‚Äì2000, e.g. `40px`, `80px`). Applied via the `--sk-size` CSS variable and controls the overall bounding box of the animation.

specifications: Purely decorative ‚Äî the element has no events, variables, or actions. To start/stop a loader, conditionally render it (v-if) based on a variable you control. There is no built-in pause/resume API.
The animation runs in an infinite CSS loop as soon as the element is mounted. Unmounting is the only way to stop it.
`color` and `size` are forwarded as CSS variables (`--sk-color`, `--sk-size`) and accept any valid CSS value.
For a contextually sized loader (e.g. inside a button), leave `size` unset and style via parent CSS ‚Äî the animation scales with the container.

Recommendations by use case: `plane` for minimal / elegant loading states, `chase` or `circle` for generic app loading, `wave` or `pulse` for audio/media playback, `grid` or `fold` for playful / game-like feels, `bounce` or `flow` for brief inline loaders.

examples.description: A medium blue plane spinner for a generic page-load state.
A small chase spinner inside a button or inline with text.
A larger pulse spinner on a hero/empty state, tinted with the design-system primary color.
